zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Banastre Knight of the Garter於1334年出生在英國藍卡爾霍利時，他的父親Sir Adam de Banastre24歲，母親Mrs Petronella de Banastre22歲。他和Agnes De Hoghton至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1379年12月16日在易利申 澤亞享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Banastre Knight of the Garter was born in 1334, in Chorley, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Adam de Banastre, was 24 and his mother, Mrs Petronella de Banastre, was 22. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Agnes De Hoghton. He died on 16 December 1379, in Irish Sea, at the age of 45.

Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Agnes De Hoghton. Il est décédé le 16 décembre 1379, à Irish Sea, à l’âge de 45 ans.

Er hatte mit Agnes De Hoghton mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Dezember 1379 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Irish Sea.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Banastre Knight of the Garter(이)가 1334년 영국 랭카실르 초를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam de Banastre(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Petronella de Banastre(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Agnes De Hoghton(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1379년 12월 16일 이리시 시에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Bank Hall near Preston, Lancashire, Engl: банк холл нир престон, ланкашир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Banastre Knight of the Garter родился в 1334 г. в местности чаурли, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Adam de Banastre было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Petronella de Banastre, 22. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Agnes De Hoghton. Он умер 16 декабря 1379 г. в местности ириш сеа в возрасте 45 лет.
